title: selaginella hosei
intro: Selaginella hosei, also known as the 'Spikemoss', is a type of rare, evergreen plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of phenolic compounds and terpenes. The health benefits of Selaginella hosei are said to include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address a range of health issues.
